calendar.matters:
Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Mar-10-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Judge: Ollie Marie Victoire, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Floyd Butler. Michael G. McKane, Esq. represented Plaintiff USAA Property and Casualty Insurance Company. Jonathan Proff was sworn and testified for the plaintiff. Good cause appearing, the Court grants judgment as follows: Principal: $44,202.04, Costs: $256.00 for a total judgment of $44,458.04. Judgment signed in open court.
Ntc Of Mtn & Mtn To Continue The Arbitration Date & Period Within Which The Arbitration Award Must Be Filed, Calendar Motion: Motion, Calendar Motion: Continue, Calendar Motion: Arbitration Hearing
